gene_description: CYP2C19 is involved in the metabolism of many drugs in the liver, including some antidepressants and anticonvulsants.

source.title: Disposition of Oral Cannabidiol-Rich Cannabis Extracts in Children with Epilepsy.
source.finding: Determined pharmacokinetic parameters of cannabidiol in children.

AA.effect: Increased plasma concentrations of CYP2C19 substrates.
AA.recommendation: Consider dose reduction or alternative therapy.

AG.effect: Moderate plasma concentrations of CYP2C19 substrates.
AG.recommendation: Monitor therapy, adjust dose if necessary.
